headline: BD Gains FDA Clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL Surgical Irrigation System
summary: BDX wins FDA 510(k) clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL antimicrobial irrigation system, expanding its surgical irrigation portfolio with a powered lavage option.

raw.headline: BD Gains FDA Clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL Surgical Irrigation System
raw.summary: BDX wins FDA 510(k) clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL antimicrobial irrigation system, expanding its surgical irrigation portfolio with a powered lavage option.

headline: Cardinal (CAH) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Cardinal (CAH). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

raw.headline: Cardinal (CAH) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?

headline: EYE Stock Up Following Q4 Earnings & Revenue Beat, Margins Rise
summary: National Vision's Q4 earnings and revenues top estimates as margins expand and comparable sales rise, sending shares up after strong traffic and ticket growth.
